title: Ideathon 2.0
tagline: BioTech & MedTech ideation competition with top teams winning BioNEST incubation.
venue: CUSB Gaya (Central University of South Bihar, Gaya)
organiser: IC IITP + Dept. of Life Science, Central University of South Bihar
specialAward: Top 20 teams eligible for BioNEST incubation at IC IITP
description: Ideathon 2.0 was co-organised by IC IITP and the Department of Life Science, Central University of South Bihar, Gaya. Teams submitted innovative ideas in BioTech and MedTech domains; the top 20 teams were offered BioNEST incubation at IC IITP. Cash prizes were awarded to the top three teams.
